title: Origins Immersion: Avian
description: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Parrot-y hearts to better fit the Avian origin in the Origins mod.
body: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Parrot-y hearts to better fit the Avian origin in the Origins mod. Additionally, the meat shanks for the food bar have been replaced with carrots to better reflect the vegetarian diet of the Avian origin. I am not formally associated with the mod or modmaker(s).
